### Code Breakdown

| Code | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `24700007` | Multiple sclerosis (general/unspecified) |
| `426373005` | Relapsing-remitting multiple sclerosis (RRMS) |

| Code | Description |
|------|-------------|

### Notes
- **Two queries are needed** to capture records coded in either SNOMED CT or ICD-10-CM, as different EHR systems may use different coding standards.

# FHIR Queries: Multiple Sclerosis Population — Treatment Optimization Initiative

---

## Group 1 — MS Diagnoses (ICD-10-CM)

> In ICD-10-CM, **G35 is the single code for all MS** (RRMS, SPMS, PPMS, and variants are not separately subcoded — clinical course is captured in narrative or SNOMED). All MS diagnoses regardless of acuity/status are included to catch recently inactive or newly transferred patients.

```
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|G35&_include=Condition:subject
```

---

## Group 2 — MS Diagnoses (SNOMED CT — Preferred: Hierarchy Traversal)

> Uses the `:below` modifier to subsume the parent MS concept **24700007** and all SNOMED descendants: RRMS, SPMS, PPMS, Marburg variant, Balò concentric sclerosis, etc. Most preferred approach for complete SNOMED coverage.

```
Condition?code:below=http://snomed.info/sct|24700007&_include=Condition:subject
```

### Group 2b — SNOMED CT (Explicit Codes — Fallback if `:below` Unsupported)
